name: Peanut Butter Pie
recipeIngredient: 9 Inch Pie Cracker or Baked Pie Shell
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix confectioners sugar and peanut butter until crumbly and set aside.
2. In a double boiler, combine cornstarch, 2/3 cup sugar, salt, and milk. Cook the mixture until it thickens.
3. Gradually add a small amount of hot mixture to slightly beaten egg yolks. Return this mixture to the sauce and stir in vanilla.
4. Cook the combined mixture until thickened again.
5. Spread half of the peanut butter mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch pie crust.
6. Pour the filling over the peanut butter layer.
7. Beat egg whites with the remaining sugar and cream of tartar. Spread this mixture over the filling.
8. Top with the remaining peanut butter mixture.
9. Bake at 350°F until brown.
